overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a steady drive along the Pacifica coastal highway during sunset. The camera moves past beach shacks and palm trees on the left while approaching a futuristic cityscape with a prominent Ferris wheel and a tall tower emitting a blue energy beam visible in the distance.

agents.ego_description: cruising steadily along the multi-lane coastal highway, maintaining speed with traffic flow

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving in the same direction ahead of the camera

entered.detail: large yellow rectangular shipping container visible in the foreground on the right side of the highway
tall palm trees lining the beach side of the highway
makeshift tents and shelters on the sandy beach area to the left
futuristic high-rise buildings visible across the water in the distance
distinctive skyscraper emitting a vertical blue energy beam into the sky
calm body of water separating the highway from the distant city

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a coastal highway during golden hour, with the camera driving forward past beach shacks and palm trees on the left. A yellow shipping container sits prominently in the right foreground, while a futuristic city skyline with a distinctive blue-beam tower looms in the distant background across the water.

events.description: large ferris wheel becomes visible on the right horizon, revealing the amusement park area
massive building under construction with cranes appears on the right side of the highway

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway while the landscape opens up to reveal the Pacifica amusement park district on the right

entered.detail: large amusement park ferris wheel silhouetted against the sunset sky
tall building under active construction with visible cranes and scaffolding

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues driving, the Ferris wheel of the Pacifica amusement park emerges on the right horizon around 25 seconds, followed by a massive construction site. The yellow container recedes into the mid-ground while the beach shacks remain visible on the left, and the distant city skyline stays ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway with construction site and amusement park

events.description: sun sets lower creating intense lens flare and backlighting on the buildings ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching the denser urban area with the construction site now dominating the right side of the frame

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the camera drives closer to the amusement park and construction site, with the unfinished building now dominating the right side. The sun creates a bright lens flare as it sets behind the buildings, and the beach elements have passed out of view to the rear. The yellow container fades into the distance while traffic continues to flow in both directions.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a coastal highway that transforms from a beachside road into an approach toward a dense, futuristic urban construction zone. It begins by gliding past beach shacks and palm trees on the left, with a yellow shipping container in the right foreground and a distant city skyline featuring a blue-beam tower. As the camera advances, the Ferris wheel of an amusement park and a massive construction site emerge on the right horizon while the beach elements begin to recede. The scene then shifts as the unfinished buildings grow to dominate the right side of the frame, causing the sun to create a bright lens flare as it sets behind the architecture. Finally, the coastal scenery disappears entirely from view as the camera pushes deeper toward the city center amidst the flow of bidirectional traffic.
